description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a straight, uniform blade and a minimalistic design. The blade appears to be double-edged and tapers slightly towards the ends, with no visible serrations or curvature. The handle is integrated seamlessly into the body, lacking any distinct ergonomic features or texturing, and there is no visible guard or pommel. The entire object is a solid, dark color, suggesting it is made from a single material, likely metal or a dense composite. The surface finish is matte, with no reflective or glossy qualities. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or ornamentation on any part of the object.
description: A long, straight, double-edged knife or sword with a seamless, minimalistic dark design and matte finish.
description_view_0: The object is seen from the broad side, showing its full length and uniform width.
description_view_1: A narrow side view reveals the thinness of the blade and handle, emphasizing its flat profile.
description_view_2: Another broad side view, identical to view 0, displaying the object's length and straight edges.
description_view_3: A second narrow side view, mirroring view 1, highlighting the object's slim, flat form.
attribute_handle_design: straight, integrated, no visible texture or ergonomic features
